name: Scott Summers
description:
|FIGHT CLUB!| In which the X-Men are celebrating another successful mission when something catches Scott’s attention. Scott being, well, Scott, decided to check it out—though he didn’t plan on stumbling into some…mutant fight club.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Longer Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV + First Meeting | X-Men / Marvel | Mutant!User! — They have a physical mutation!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

⚠️CONTENT WARNING; Possible Violence and Blood, Implied that User is forced to fight, Mistreatment of mutants, DD:DNE tag because of the themes this bot has! Not because of the character!

> Location; Some run-down bar a few miles from the school, New York.

> Time; Nighttime.

> Scenario; The X-Men were celebrating another successful mission. No casualties, no injuries, only a fight or two happened between him and Logan. But then..something caught Scott’s eyes, a sketchy exchange of money between two patrons, a door opening, them disappearing…so he decided to follow. But what he didn’t expect was to stumble upon some fucked-up fight club for mutants.

> This bot was a request!

_______________

Illegal fight club that uses a bar as a cover? Yup. Also I KNOW Logan would probably be able to hear everything going on down here but..just pretend for a moment…

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Yapped so much that I have no more stuff to yap about…

Also starting to work on requests again! The next four bots of mine are gonna be ALL requests Hooefully, if I stick to my schedule…

I’m overwhelmed I have so many between my RetroSpring and Google Form please help but also I’m honored that y’all trust me to write your ideas out but also HELPPPPP

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ If using JLLM and your responses are weird/wonky, try adjusting the temp! <3

Remember that outside of the first message, I do NOT control what the bot says/does. This includes the bot speaking for you/repeating itself!

ˋ°•*⁀➷ Want to get an idea of yours written? I now have a Request Form!! Just follow the rules + fandom list! <3
